zh.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz是Matheus Fritz和Unknown的兒子，於1657年7月24日出生在德國爾特波格維爾仁海姆格洛斯代巴賀韓根代巴賀。他於1683年8月26日與Anna Bauer在德國爾特波格維爾仁海姆洛其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1739年7月17日享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz是Matheus Fritz和Unknown的儿子，于1657年7月24日出生在德国爾特波格維爾仁海姆格洛斯代巴賀韓根代巴賀。他于1683年8月26日与Anna Bauer在德国爾特波格維爾仁海姆洛其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1739年7月17日享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fritz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a pet form of the personal name Friedrich . This form of the surname is also found in Denmark, Sweden, the Netherlands, and France (Alsace and Lorraine), and also in central European countries such as Slovenia, Croatia, Czechia, and Slovakia, where it is more often spelled in the Slavicized form Fric (see below).

Americanized or Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Fric: from the personal name Fric, a pet form, of German origin (see above), of Old Czech and Slovak Fridrich, Slovenian Friderik, Croatian Fridrik, equivalents of German Friedrich .

variants.name: Friedrich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Ernst, Ewald, Franz, Gerhard, Heiner, Heinz, Helmuth, Klaus, Reinhard.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements frid, fred ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’. The name was borne by a 9th-century Christian saint, bishop of Utrecht, and was a hereditary name among the Hohenstaufen ruling family; hence its popularity in central Europe.

variants.name: Fritzen
meanings: German and Danish: patronymic or pet form of   Fritz   (see   Friedrich  ).

variants.name: Fritzler
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ulrich, Gerhart.
German: from Fritzel, an enlarged form of Fritz .

variants.name: Fritze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Erna, Gunther, Hans, Kurt, Otto.

nameMeanings.name: Theiss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Helmut, Ingo, Johann, Klaus, Viktor.

variants.name: Theis
meanings: North German: from a shortened form of the personal name Matthias (see Matthew ).

en.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz was born on 24 July 1657, in Hangendeinbach, Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Germany as the son of Matheus Fritz and Unknown. He married Anna Bauer on 26 August 1683, in Lorch, Welzheim, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 17 July 1739, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz est né le 24 juillet 1657, à Hangendeinbach, Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Allemagne, fils de Matheus Fritz et Unknown. Il a épousé Anna Bauer le 26 août 1683, à Lorch, Welzheim, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1739, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz wurde am 24. Juli 1657 in Hangendeinbach, Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Deutschland, als Sohn von Matheus Fritz und Unknown geboren. Er hat am 26. August 1683 in Lorch, Welzheim, Württemberg, Deutschland Anna Bauer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juli 1739 im Alter von 81 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz è nato il il 24 luglio 1657 nel Hangendeinbach, Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Germania come figlio di Matheus Fritz e Unknown. Lui sposato Anna Bauer il 26 agosto 1683, nel Lorch, Welzheim, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 luglio 1739, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritzは1657年7月24日にドイツウuルッテンバーグウエルズヘイムグロssデインバチハンジェンデインバチでMatheus FritzとUnknownの息子として生まれた。1683年8月26日にドイツウuルッテンバーグウエルズヘイムロルチでAnna Bauerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1739年7月17日に81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz(은)는 1657년 7월 24일 독일 wu르테버그 웰즈하임 그로ss데인바치 핸겐데인바치에서 Matheus Fritz(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1683년 8월 26일 독일 wu르테버그 웰즈하임 로르치에서 Anna Bauer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1739년 7월 17일 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz nasceu em 24 de julho de 1657, em Hangendeinbach, Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Alemanha filho de Matheus Fritz e Unknown. Ele casou-se com Anna Bauer em 26 de agosto de 1683, em Lorch, Welzheim, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1739, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz родился 24 июля 1657 г. в местности хангендинбач, гроssдинбач, велжим, вuрттембирг, Германия. Его родителей звали Matheus Fritz и Unknown. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Bauer 26 августа 1683 г. в местности лорх, велжим, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 17 июля 1739 г. в возрасте 81 год.

es.24 July 1657–17 July 1739: 24 de julio de 1657–17 de julio de 1739
es.lifeSummary: Theiss Fritz nació el 24 de julio de 1657, en Hangendeinbach, Großdeinbach, Welzheim, Württemberg, Alemania como hijo de Matheus Fritz y Unknown. Se casó con Anna Bauer el 26 de agosto de 1683, en Lorch, Welzheim, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de julio de 1739, a la edad de 81 años.
